summary: Manage the research publication process from manuscript drafting through journal selection, submission preparation, peer review response, and dissemination.

inputs.name: research_findings
inputs.description: Finalized research findings, data, and analysis results.

inputs.name: target_venue
inputs.description: Target journal, conference, or publication venue.

inputs.name: authorship_list
inputs.description: Author list with contributions and affiliations.

outputs.name: manuscript_draft
outputs.description: Publication-ready manuscript following target venue guidelines.

outputs.name: submission_package
outputs.description: Complete submission package with cover letter, figures, and supplementary materials.

outputs.name: dissemination_plan
outputs.description: Post-publication dissemination strategy including preprints and social media.

gates.rule: Confirm research findings are finalized and approved by all authors.
Verify authorship list and contributions are agreed upon.
Manuscript must follow target venue formatting and style guidelines.
All citations verified and submission package complete.

steps.action: Evaluate and select target journal based on scope, impact, and open access requirements.
Draft manuscript following IMRaD structure and target journal guidelines.
Format all citations and references in the required journal style.
Prepare publication-quality figures, tables, and supplementary materials.
Compile submission package with cover letter, manuscript, and supplementary files.
Create post-publication dissemination plan including preprints and outreach.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read research findings, data, and prior drafts.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Save manuscript, figures, and submission package.

tools.name: web.search
tools.purpose: Search journal guidelines and publication policies.

verification.method: Verify manuscript follows target journal formatting guidelines.
Verify all citations reference real, verifiable publications.
Verify all authors have approved the final manuscript.
Verify submission package includes all required components.

success_criteria: Manuscript is formatted for the target journal and passes initial editorial screening.
All citations are verified and correctly formatted.
Submission package is complete with all required documents.

rollback.when: If citations are fabricated or authorship is disputed, halt and resolve before submission.
